name: Y2K Beaded Pastels Phone Charm
description: Universal beaded wrist strap featuring custom pastel aesthetics, compatible with all mobile device cases.
warning: Do not swing the phone excessively by the charm strap to prevent accidental impacts.

name: Metallic Star Cross-Body Phone Chain
description: Heavy-duty metallic link chain styled with star accents and a universal insert tab that effortlessly slides into any standard phone case.
warning: Ensure the underlying case is fully snapped onto the phone before using the lanyard weight-bearing load.

name: Silicon Octobuddy Suction Mount - Black
description: Hands-free silicone suction mat featuring a high-strength adhesive backing that securely mounts directly onto any smooth, flat mobile case surface.

specs.compatibility: Universal (Fits all flat-surface Android & iPhone cases)

warning: Test suction security on smooth glass or mirror surfaces before completely letting go of your device.

name: Silicon Octobuddy Suction Mount - Pastel Pink
description: Hands-free pastel pink silicone suction mat tailored for content creators. Perfect for stable mounting on mirrors, windows, and clean gym glass walls.

specs.compatibility: Universal (Fits all flat-surface Android & iPhone cases)

warning: Ensure the target mounting surface is clean, dry, and dust-free to maximize suction hold.

name: Diamond Lens Protector
description: Individual alloy ring tempered glass protectors crafted with diamond-hard finishes for elite scratch resistance.
warning: Clean camera housing meticulously with alcohol wipes before installation to eliminate trapped dust bubbles.

name: Universal Camera Glass Protector (3-Pack)
description: Ultra-thin, high-definition tempered glass film precision cut to match standard multi-camera arrays on popular mobile builds.
warning: Align perfectly with the camera flash cutouts to preserve optimal nighttime photo exposures.

name: iPhones Lens Protectors
description: Premium anti-reflective sapphire glass rings engineered specifically to isolate and preserve original flagship camera profile optics.
warning: Pressure-press firmly for 15 seconds during installation to solidify the water-resistant adhesive ring bond.
